name: Apple-Spice Bars
recipeInstructions:
Core and Peel Apples. Chop as fine as possible.
Cream shortening and sugar. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir together the flour, salt, baking powder, baking soda, nutmeg, ginger, and mix in finely chopped apples until combined. Spread mixture into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan. Mix sugar and cinnamon. Sprinkle topping evenly over dough.
Bake at 350 degrees F for 25 to 30 minutes. Cool before cutting into bars. Makes 36 bars.
